description: Sit in Sofa, grab the line with both hands and press the line against your butt/thighs. Then throw yourself forward or backward, initiating the roll. To stop the roll, extend your legs.
descriptionEs: Siéntate en sofá, agarra la línea con ambas manos y presiona la línea contra tu culo. A continuación, déjate caer hacia atrás.
tips: Leash to the side can help prevent bad falls; If you fall into a backlever position let go of the line in order to save your shoulders; You can practice this trick with a hangover clipped in to save energy and get familiar with the movement without fear of falling badly
tipsEs: La correa a un lado puede ayudar a prevenir las malas caídas; si se cae en una posición de espalda, suelte la línea para salvar sus hombros.

description: With both hands on the line supporting your weight you lie on your belly and roll forward (or backward) around the line.
descriptionEs: Con las dos manos en la línea soportando tu peso, te tumbas sobre el vientre de manera perpendicular y ruedas hacia delante alrededor de la línea.
tips: You can try this trick clipped into the hangover first to save energy while familiarizing yourself with the movement.

description: From lying on your chest get some momentum with your free arm and leg, hook the line with one foot and then roll around the line grabbing it with both hands. Land back in chest.
descriptionEs: Desde el pecho toma impulso con la pierna libre y luego rueda alrededor de la línea agarrándola con ambas manos. Aterriza de nuevo en el pecho.
tips: You can wrap the foot around the line to avoid falling away from the line. Alternatively, you can press it against the line from below; You can try this trick clipped into a hangover at first to familiarize yourself with the movement.
tipsEs: Puede envolver el pie alrededor de la línea para evitar que se caiga de la línea.

description: Sit in Korean, grab the line with one hand in front of you and one hand behind you and let yourself fall to the side. Land back in Korean.
descriptionEs: Siéntese en Korean, agarre la línea frente a usted con ambas manos y déjese caer hacia un lado.
tips: Start the movement while the line moves upwards; You can try this trick clipped into a hangover first; Sometimes called "Harry Potter Roll"
tipsEs: A veces llamado "Rollo de Harry Potter"

Name: Panic
description: From Sofa you start a 180 FS spin, grab the line on your side with both hands and swing the far leg over the line to land in Korean.
descriptionEs: Desde el Sofá agarras la línea de tu lado con ambas manos mirando hacia el mismo lado. Si vas a la izquierda quieres balancear tu pierna derecha sobre la línea haciendo un 270 (180 si empiezas desde Butt) aterrizando en coreano.
tips: Keep your center of gravity above the line.
tipsEs: Es un rollo de pánico sin el rollo.

description: Lie on your back and grab the line behind your head with both hands. Hook one foot under the line and roll around the line landing again in Backbounce.
descriptionEs: Túmbate de espaldas y agarra la línea por detrás de la cabeza con ambas manos. Engancha un pie bajo la línea y rueda alrededor de la línea aterrizando de nuevo en Backbounce.
tips: As soon as you rotated all the way, let go with your hands and put your arms to the side to stop the roll. Letting go of the line feels counterintuitive, but it really helps to land the trick.

Name: Panic Roll
description: Sit in Sofa position grab the line to the side of you with hands facing behind you. On the way up in the bounce dive down where your hands are and roll around the line. Land in Korean or Chest. Essentially you perform a 270 spin combined with a roll around the line.
descriptionEs: Siéntate en posición de sofá y agarra la línea a tu lado con las manos mirando hacia atrás. Al subir, sumérgete donde están tus manos y rueda alrededor de la línea. Aterriza en coreano o en pecho.
tips: It helps to separately practice the spin of the leg (Panic) and the roll around the line and then work to combine both at the same time.

Name: Utinni Roll
description: Start in Sofa. Both hands next to you (right or left) holding on to the line. Then do a Sofa Roll with your body leaning towards the line where your hands are. To land the trick put the hands back to normal as you would when sitting in Sofa.
descriptionEs: Comienza en el sofá. Las dos manos a tu lado (derecha o izquierda) sujetándose a la línea. Luego haz un Sofa Roll con tu cuerpo inclinado hacia la línea donde están tus manos.
tipsEs: Manténgase pequeño y compacto durante el rodaje.

Name: Richy Roll
description: From Korean swing one leg over the line and immediately after you start the leg swing initiate a roll to finish as a Sofa Roll.
descriptionEs: Desde korean déjate caer hacia un lado e inmediatamente después de empezar el roll balancea una pierna sobre la línea para terminar el rollo como un sofa-roll
tips: Be comfortable with Sofa Rolls first.

description: Do a Back Korean Roll with both hands in front. During the roll, pass the front leg between you and the line to land in Sofa.
descriptionEs: Inicia el movimiento de un back korean roll pero pasa una pierna por delante para terminar en sofa al final del roll

description: Sit in Expo Buddha, grab the line both hands on the sides, roll around the line, land again in Expo Buddha.
descriptionEs: Roll con las piernas cruzadas en forma de buda , una mano alante y otra atras. si es en expo una mano a cada lado

Name: Flowflip
description: From Korean, combine a 360 spin with a Korean roll around the line. Either start or land in Switch Korean. Similar to a Panic Roll but you start from Korean turned 90 further away to where you want to go.
descriptionEs: Es similar a un panic roll, pero empiezas desde korean girado 90 más lejos de donde quieres ir.
tips: Learn how to do a Panic Roll first. Then think of it as a Panic Roll from Korean.
tipsEs: Agarra la línea a tu espalda y déjate caer hacia atrás. El resto ocurre por arte de magia.

description: Do a Panic Roll but before you land throw your second leg on the other side of the line as well to land back in Sofa.
descriptionEs: Haz un panic roll pero antes de aterrizar lanza tu segunda pierna al otro lado de la línea también para aterrizar de nuevo en Sofá.

description: From Backbounce move forward like you are going to Chest but add a Chest Roll.
descriptionEs: Desde el Backbounce muévete hacia delante como si fueras a hacer Chest pero añade un Chest Roll.

description: From Backbounce swing one leg to other side and then perform a Panic Roll in the opposite direction.
descriptionEs: Desde el Backbounce gira una pierna hacia un lado y rueda alrededor de la línea del otro lado para realizar un Panic Roll.

description: Two Hammock Rolls in one bounce.
descriptionEs: Dos hammok roll en un solo rebote.

description: While doing the second half of a Back Roll, also turn once around the line, so do a Back Roll with a Korean Roll at the end.
descriptionEs: Esto suele ocurrir cuando se intenta hacer un Back Roll normal con un mal timing (demasiado temprano)
tips: For some people, this happens automatically when they try a Back Roll with bad timing. If you're not one of those, try adding a Korean Roll in the second half of the Back Roll.

Technical name: Korean 270 Spin to Back Belly Roll
Name: Underflip
description: Spin with one leg 270 degrees from Korean to Belly into a Back Belly Roll.
descriptionEs: Gira como si hicieras un flowflip (sin roll) pero luego termina con un giro de vientre hacia atrás.
tips: Be comfortable with Back Belly Rolls first; Start the spin with the intention of finishing as a Back Belly Roll.

description: From Sit you stand up on the top of the bounce. If you don't have enough momentum, you can pull on the line with one arm.
descriptionEs: Desde Sit te levantas en la parte superior del rebote. Si no tienes suficiente impulso, puedes tirar de la línea con un brazo.
tips: Learning this is a lot about learning the correct timing which is doing the trick at the top of the bounce when you feel weightless.

description: From standing on the line you let the line come towards your body on the top of the bounce and then slide your feet off the line to land in Korean.
descriptionEs: Desde la línea de pie, dejas que la línea se acerque a tu cuerpo en la parte superior del rebote y luego deslizas tus pies fuera de la línea para aterrizar en el coreano.

description: On the way to the top of the bounce you let the line come towards your body and grab it with one hand. Slide your front foot off the line and with your hand controlling the line you drop down to chest.
descriptionEs: En el camino hacia la cima del rebote dejas que la línea venga hacia tu cuerpo y la agarras con una mano. Desliza el pie delantero fuera de la línea y con la mano que controla la línea te dejas caer sobre el pecho.
tips: It can help to practice briefly grabing the line at the top of the bounce while bouncing in normal to learn to let the line come to you instead of you droping down to the line.

description: From Soup you stand up on the top of the bounce. If you don't have enough momentum, you can pull the line with one arm.
descriptionEs: Desde Soup te pones de pie en la parte superior del rebote. Si no tienes suficiente impulso, puedes tirar de la línea con un brazo.

description: From standing on the line you let the line come towards your body on the top of the bounce and sit down keeping one foot on the line.
descriptionEs: De pie en la línea dejas que la línea venga hacia tu cuerpo en la parte superior del rebote y te sientas manteniendo uno de tus pies en la línea.
tips: Feels like sitting down on something behind you; Don't try to grab the line in case you loose the balance; It can help to practice Korean bounces first and then Soup bounces.

Name: Mini-Fireflip
description: From Korean grab the line behind you and go into a Front Chest Roll. Land back in Korean looking at the other anchor.
descriptionEs: Desde el coreano agarra la línea detrás de ti y haz un Front Chest Roll. Aterriza de nuevo en coreano mirando al otro ancla.

Name: Flow
description: From Korean you grab the line with both hands behind you and then swing your far leg over the line twice to do a 360 landing back in Korean.
descriptionEs: Desde el coreano agarras las manos mirando hacia el mismo lado en la línea detrás de ti y luego balanceas tu pierna más lejana sobre la línea dos veces para hacer un 360 aterrizando de nuevo en el coreano.
tips: Practice the same movement from Sofa first (= Panic).
tipsEs: Es un Flowflip sin el rollo alrededor de la línea.

Name: Back Richy Roll
description: From Korean let yourself fall to the side and immediately after you start the roll swing one leg over the line to finish the roll as a Back Sofa Roll.

From Korean, grab the line in front of you with both hands. Shift your weight onto your arms, swing one leg over the line and start bringing it to the front. Lean backwards, release your front hand and swing the same leg as before back over the line. Finish sitting in Korean.
From Backbounce get back up into Korean and in one fluid motion kick one leg over the line to go into a Sofa Roll.
descriptionEs: Desde el Backbounce vuelve a subir a korean y en un movimiento fluido patea una pierna por encima de la línea para pasar a un Sofa Roll.
tips: Start the motion of getting up from Backbounce to Korean really early in the upward motion of the line.

description: Start a Belly Roll from Sofa and add a 180 at the end.
descriptionEs: Empieza como si hicieras un panik roll pero al final saca el culo y aterriza en Sofá.

description: Let the line come to your butt and grab it right behind your butt with one hand and then go to Backbounce, grab the second hand behind your head, hook with one foot and do a Hammock Roll.
descriptionEs: Rueda hacia abajo a Backbounce desde pie .

Name: Escoba Roll
description: Do a Back Roll from Feet but with a roll around the line as well.
descriptionEs: Haz un voltereta hacia atras  desde los Pies pero con un roll alrededor de la línea también.

Name: Richard Roll
description: Do a Back Korean Roll, pass the front leg over the line to be in Sofa, pass the back leg over the line to end in Korean facing the other anchor.
descriptionEs: Haz un Rollo Coreano de Espalda pero las piernas se alejan de la línea para girar 180 y aterrizar de nuevo en coreano mirando al otro ancla.

Name: Spiral
description: Do a Nevermind up but instead of going to Feet you spin 360 backside and land in Chest.
descriptionEs: Haz una subida de Nevermind pero en vez de ir a Pies giras 360 y aterrizas en Pecho.

description: Double Roll in Double Drop Knee.
descriptionEs: Doble rodillo en la rodilla de doble caída.

Technical name: Inward Drop Knee Spin to Front Sofa Roll
description: Start from Inward Drop Knee, take the front foot off the line to spin 270 to go into a Front Sofa Roll.
descriptionEs: Comienza desde la rodilla caída hacia adentro y gira 270 para entrar en un rollo de sofá frontal.

Name: Nasty Chest
description: Sick Nasty landing in Chest.
descriptionEs: Sick Nasty aterrizando en el pecho.

Name: Nasty Chest Roll
description: Sick Nasty to Chest Roll.
descriptionEs: Rollo de la enfermedad en el pecho.

description: From Backbounce do a Back Roll but stop in Shoulderstand.
descriptionEs: Desde el Backbounce haz un Back Roll pero detente en el Shoulderstand.

Name: Dirty Bastard
description: From standing do a 360 spin and land in Chest.
descriptionEs: Desde la posición de pie se gira 360 y se aterriza en Pecho.

description: Starting from Rocket, initiate a frontflip motion and let go of one hand, bring both legs over the line to land in Sofa.
descriptionEs: Antihéroe pero aterrizando en Sofá.

Name: California Roll
description: From standing let the line come to your kneepit and roll to the side landing in Korean.
descriptionEs: Desde la posición de pie deja que la línea llegue a tu rodilla y rueda hacia el lado aterrizando en coreano.

description: From Rocket pull yourself up and then swing the legs over the line in a Sick Nasty motion. You have to let go off the line with one hand so your legs can pass to land in Sofa. Alternatively you can also thread both legs in between your arms and the line to go to Sofa.
descriptionEs: Desde la mosca colgante hasta el sofá.

description: Three Hammock Rolls in one bounce.
descriptionEs: Tres rollos de hamaca en un solo rebote.

Technical name: Back Roll from Back to Back
Name: Back Magic
description: Back Roll directly into Backbounce.
descriptionEs: Rollo de espalda directamente en Backbounce.

description: Choose a shoulder that you will roll over to do this trick and put the leash on the side of this shoulder. From Backbounce wait until you are at the very top of the bounce and then pull yourself back over the shoulder and land in Korean.
descriptionEs: Desde el Backbounce tira hacia atrás por encima del hombro y aterriza en coreano.
tips: Have the leash on the same side as the shoulder you roll over.
tipsEs: Tenga la correa en el mismo lado que el hombro sobre el que rueda.

description: Arrange the leash such that it's hanging down on the side of the shoulder that you are doing the shoulderstand from. Start with the shoulderstand and wait until you're at the top of the bounce. Then push yourself to the front by pushing with your hands off of the line, roll over your back and finish the trick by landing in Korean.
descriptionEs: Desde la parada de hombros rueda sobre tu espalda para aterrizar en coreano.
tips: If you are on the right shoulder try to thread your right arm through the leash so you don't end up with the leash stuck on your shoulder.;Often you will slightly overrotate this trick and it can help to grab with both hands in front of you to stop the momentum.
tipsEs: Si está en el hombro derecho, intente pasar el brazo derecho por la correa para no acabar con la correa atascada en el hombro.

description: Hang in Nevermind, thread the leg that is free through your leg and the closer arm and kick through to go to a Back Belly Roll.
descriptionEs: Colócate en Nevermind pero con las manos opuestas. Enhebra la pierna que está libre a través de tu pierna y el brazo más cercano y da una patada para pasar a Back Belly Roll.

description: From Belly lift one foot up on the line, remove the hand on the same side to help you balance and then press the line down with this foot and the other hand to get the second foot up.
descriptionEs: Desde el vientre levanta un pie en la línea, saca la mano del mismo lado para ayudarte a equilibrar y luego presiona la línea hacia abajo con este pie y la otra mano para levantar el segundo pie.

description: From Sofa lift one foot up on the line, remove the hand on the same side to help you balance and then press the line down with this foot and the other hand to get the second foot up.
descriptionEs: Desde el sofá levanta un pie en la línea, saca la mano del mismo lado para ayudarte a equilibrar y luego presiona la línea hacia abajo con este pie y la otra mano para levantar el segundo pie.
tips: You might need to shift your weight to the opposite side of the foot you are trying to get onto the line; If you have access to a rodeoline with mats, this is a trick you can practice there first.
tipsEs: Es posible que tengas que desplazar tu peso hacia el lado opuesto del pie con el que intentas entrar en la línea.

description: From Korean you get both feet on top of the line at the same time followed by a Sit Mount in the same bounce or you put one foot on the line followed by a Soup to Feet in the same bounce.
descriptionEs: Desde el coreano se ponen los dos pies encima de la línea. Luego haz un Sit Mount en el mismo rebote.
tips: Depending on your preferred variation, practice Sit to Feet or Soup to Feet first and then korean to feet will be a natural upgrade when you have the former solid enough.
tipsEs: Un mayor rebote te ayuda a estar de pie.

description: From Backbounce go to Korean and add a Korean to Feet in the same bounce. Alternatively, you can hook the line with one foot to assist pulling yourself up.
descriptionEs: Desde la espalda, engancha un pie bajo la línea y desde este pie tira hasta una posición vertical. A continuación, utiliza el pie libre para ponerlo sobre la línea y ponerte de pie sobre ella. Antes de que termine el rebote desengancha el pie y ponte de pie.
tips: Depending on your preferred variation, practice Sit to Feet or Korean to Feet first.

description: From Chest you push the line down with one arm and the back foot in order to put your front foot on the line.
descriptionEs: Desde el pecho se empuja la línea hacia abajo con un brazo y el pie trasero para poner el pie delantero en la línea.

description: From standing on the line you let the line come towards your body on the top of the bounce and when your butt is on the line, slide your feet off the line and lean all the way back to land in Back.
descriptionEs: De pie en la línea dejas que la línea venga hacia tu cuerpo en la parte superior del rebote y cuando tu trasero está en la línea te inclinas completamente hacia atrás y deslizas tus pies fuera de la línea para aterrizar en Back.
tips: Learn a Korean Bounce first, practice leaning back from Korean to Back, and then combine both motions into one bounce.

description: From standing on the line you let the line come towards your body on the top of the bounce and sit down keeping both of your feet on the line.
descriptionEs: De pie en la línea, dejas que la línea venga hacia tu cuerpo en la parte superior del rebote y te sientas manteniendo ambos pies en la línea.
tips: Feels like sitting down on something behind you; Don't try to grab the line in case you loose your balance; It can help to practice Korean bounces first, then Soup bounces and then Sit bounces.

description: From Exposure let the line come towards your body and grab the line with both hands then slide your feet off to land in Sofa.
descriptionEs: Desde la exposición deja que la línea se acerque a tu cuerpo y agarra la línea con ambas manos, luego desliza tus pies para aterrizar en Sofá.
tips: It can help to practice briefly grabing the line at the top of the bounce while bouncing in Expo; This way you can learn to let the line come towards your butt instead of you droping down to Sofa.

description: From Exposure let the line come towards your body and grab the line with both hands then slide your feet off to land in Belly.
descriptionEs: Desde la exposición deja que la línea se acerque a tu cuerpo y agarra la línea con ambas manos, luego desliza tus pies para aterrizar en Belly.

description: From Korean you do a 270 BS spin to the front and then go into a Front Sofa Roll.
descriptionEs: Desde el coreano se hace un giro hacia atrás junto con un giro hacia atrás terminando en Sofá.

Name: Wolf Flip
description: From Korean initiate a 360 BS spin to the front and simultaneously start a roll backwards, spin for a full 360 to land back in Korean after the roll is finished.
descriptionEs: Desde el coreano hacer un giro de 360º hacia atrás junto con un giro hacia atrás terminando en coreano.

description: From Sofa do a 360 spin by doing a 180 to Belly and another 180 from Belly to Sofa.
descriptionEs: Desde Sofá agarra la línea de tu lado y luego pasando por encima de tu vientre haz un 360 aterrizando de nuevo en Sofá.
tips: You can start by practicing the 180 from Belly to Sofa; You need to find your balance over the line and to land it you need to stick your butt out.
tipsEs: Para aterrizar hay que sacar el culo.

Name: Wolf
description: From Korean, grab the line in front of you and pass one leg over the line twice (first behind you, at the end in front of you) to do a 360 spin. It is the inverse motion of a Flow.
From Korean, grab the line in front of you and pass one leg over the line to do a 270 spin landing in Sofa. It is the inverse motion of a Panic.
From the catch position (Nevermind), pull yourself up, put the hooking foot on top of the line, and push yourself up to put the second foot back on the line.
descriptionEs: Desde la posición de captura (no importa) ponte de pie.

Name: Flare
description: From Sofa you grab the line next to you with both hands and swing the legs over the line and around behind you and again over the line on the other side of your hands back to Sofa.
descriptionEs: Desde el Sofá agarras la línea que está a tu lado con ambas manos y balanceas las piernas por encima de la línea y por detrás de ti y de nuevo por encima de la línea al otro lado de tus manos de vuelta al Sofá.

description: From Shoulderstand, tuck your legs, roll to one side and extend your legs for the landing back in Shoulderstand.
descriptionEs: Desde la postura de los hombros gira hacia un lado y vuelve a la postura de los hombros.

Name: Butter
description: In Butt grab the line with the front hand behind you. Then pull with that arm to do a 360 landing back in Sofa.
descriptionEs: En Sofa agarra la línea detrás de ti (el brazo derecho agarra la línea a tu izquierda detrás de ti o viceversa). Luego tira con ese brazo para hacer un aterrizaje de 360 en Sofa.

Technical name: Rocket Mount to Back Sofa Roll
description: From Hanging swing your legs beside your hands (similar to a Sick Nasty movement) and go into a Back Sofa Roll.
descriptionEs: Desde Hanging balancea tus piernas al lado de tus manos (similar a un movimiento Sick Nasty) y pasa a un Back Sofa Roll.

description: From Belly turn one time around the line and land in Exposure in one bounce.
descriptionEs: Desde Belly gira una vez alrededor de la línea y aterriza en Exposure en un rebote.

description: Start by doing a Chest Roll and then do a Front Roll by pushing with one foot off the line.
descriptionEs: Comienza haciendo un Rollo de Pecho y luego haz un Rollo de Frente empujando con un pie fuera de la línea.

description: From standing do a 360 spin while doing a roll around the line and land in Chest.
descriptionEs: Desde la posición de pie se gira 360 mientras se hace un rollo alrededor de la línea y se aterriza en Pecho.

Name: Rock'n'Roll
description: From Rocket do a Reverse Rocket Mount but instead of going to Feet you land in Sofa.
descriptionEs: Desde Rocket haz un Reverse Rocket Mount pero en lugar de ir a Feet aterriza en Sofa.

description: From the Rocket you kick your feet through your arms between the line and your body, regrab the line and land back in Rocket.
descriptionEs: Desde el Cohete pateas tus pies a través de tus brazos entre la línea y tu cuerpo, vuelves a agarrar la línea y aterrizas de nuevo en el Cohete.

description: Start like a Reverse Rocket Mount and go into a Double Drop Knee position but then fully extend your hips while keeping the line at your ankles behind your back. Roll around the line and end up back in Rocket.
descriptionEs: Sube por detrás de la línea en posición de Doble Rodilla Caída, pero luego extiende completamente la parte superior del cuerpo y la parte superior de las piernas mientras mantienes la línea en tus tobillos por detrás de tu espalda. Rueda alrededor de la línea y termina de nuevo en Colgado.

Name: Full Rocket
description: From Rocket do a 360 around the horizontal axis perpendicular to the line and land again in Rocket.
descriptionEs: Desde Rocket haz un 360 alrededor de un eje perpendicular a la línea y aterriza de nuevo en Rocket.

Name: Rocket Rewind
description: Start by doing a Rocket Mount but then go into a Belly Roll finishing with a 180 to Sofa.
descriptionEs: Comienza haciendo un Rocket Mount pero luego pasa a un Belly Roll terminando con un 180 a Sofa.
tips: Get a lot of momentum for the Rocket Roll and in the end do a 180 and stick your butt out as in the Sofa Roll 360.
tipsEs: Coge mucho impulso para el Rocket Roll y al final haz un 180 y saca el culo como en el Sofa Roll 360.

Name: Can of Soup
description: From Soup, you grab one hand in front and one behind, you roll to the side of the leg on the line, put the second foot up, and pull yourself up to land to Feet in normal stance.
descriptionEs: Desde la sentada a una pierna se rueda hacia un lado en la dirección de la pierna que está en la línea y se aterriza a los pies en posición normal.

description: Sick Nasty with an additional Back Sofa Roll in the same bounce.
descriptionEs: Sick Nasty con un rollo de sofá adicional en el mismo rebote.
tips: Regrab with the far hand to get into the Back Sofa Roll.
tipsEs: Regrabación con la mano más lejana para entrar en el rollo del sofá trasero.

Name: Baguette
description: From Sofa you do a 360, put the outter foot on the line first and then put the second foot on to land in Exposure.
descriptionEs: Desde Sofá haces un 360 y luego aterrizas en Exposición

description: Do a Chest Roll and in the end of the roll push yourself away from the line to put your front foot on.
descriptionEs: Haz un rollo de pecho y al final del rollo empújate de la línea para poner los pies.

description: Sick Nasty Roll but starting from Korean.
descriptionEs: Sick Nasty Roll pero empezando por el coreano.

Name: Flare to Feet
description: From Sofa you grab the line next to you with both hands and swing the legs over the line and around behind you and then you land in Exposure on the other side of your hands.
descriptionEs: Desde el Sofá agarras la línea que está a tu lado con las dos manos y balanceas las piernas sobre la línea y por detrás de ti y luego aterrizas en Exposición al otro lado de tus manos.

description: Similar to Rocket Mount. Instead of putting both feet between your hands, put one foot outside of your hands, then put the second foot between the hands to land in Exposure.
descriptionEs: Es una mezcla entre Rocket Mount y Nevermind.
tipsEs: Regrabación con la mano más lejana para entrar en el rollo del sofá trasero.

description: From Soup you roll to the side in the direction of your leg that is hanging down and land to Feet in normal stance.
descriptionEs: Desde la sentada a una pierna, rueda hacia un lado en dirección a la pierna que cuelga y aterriza con los pies en posición normal.

description: Do a Sofa Roll and during the roll you lean a bit to the side so you can get one foot on the line, to finish the roll you get the second foot up and stand up.
descriptionEs: Haz un Sofa Roll y durante el rollo te inclinas un poco hacia un lado para poder poner un pie en la línea para terminar el rollo subes el segundo pie y te pones de pie.
tips: An easier variation is to already start with one foot on the line when you start the roll.

description: Do a Back Sofa Roll and during the roll you lean a bit to the side so you can get one foot on the line, to finish the roll you get the second foot up and stand up.
descriptionEs: Haz un rollo de sofá hacia atrás y durante el rollo te inclinas un poco hacia el lado para poder poner un pie en la línea para terminar el rollo subes el segundo pie y te pones de pie.
tips: An easier variation is to already start with one foot on the line when you start the roll.

description: It's like a Sick Nasty from Rocket to Rocket, but passing the legs over the line to the front.
descriptionEs: Sick Nasty de Rocket a Rocket.

description: Rocket Mount landing in Double Drop Knee.
descriptionEs: Aterrizaje con cohete en doble caída de rodilla.

Name: Fake Orbital
description: Orbital 180 landing in Chest. The 180 makes it easier compared to the normal Orbital. Also called Norbital.
descriptionEs: Aterrizaje del Orbital 180 en el pecho. El 180 facilita el aterrizaje.
tipsEs: También llamado Norbital.

description: From Korean grab the line behind you and go into a Front Chest Roll. Land on your shoulder to finish the trick.
descriptionEs: Desde el coreano agarra la línea detrás de ti y haz un Front Chest Roll. Aterriza sobre tu hombro para terminar el truco.

Name: Sushi
description: Korean from Feet and Korean to Feet in one bounce. You have to let the line pop at the beginning.
descriptionEs: El elegante pop coreano de Feet to Feet.
tips: Consider buying a cup to protect your genitals (applies to men and women).

description: Start as you would for a Nevermind but then use your foot that is in contact with the line to initiate a FS spin and do a 180 before you land in Exposure.
descriptionEs: Comienza como lo harías para un Nevermind pero luego utiliza el pie que está en contacto con la línea para iniciar un giro y hacer un 180 antes de aterrizar en la Exposición.

description: Front Sofa Roll to Feet but starting from Korean so you have to swing one leg over the line first.
descriptionEs: Rollo de sofá frontal a los pies, pero comenzando desde el coreano, por lo que tiene que girar una pierna sobre la línea primero.

description: Back Sofa Roll to Feet but starting from Korean so you have to swing one leg over the line first.
descriptionEs: Rollo de sofá de espalda a los pies, pero comenzando desde el coreano, por lo que tiene que girar una pierna sobre la línea primero.

description: Do a 360 spin, restepping with your feet twice.
descriptionEs: Giro de 360 grados de pie. Es una técnica.

description: From Butt grab the line with one hand behind your back. With this hand you pull yourself to do a 360 Butt Flatspin and add a Back Sofa Roll in the end.
descriptionEs: Desde el Sofá agarra la línea con una mano detrás de tu espalda en el otro lado. Con esta mano te tiras para hacer un 360 y añadir un Back Sofa Roll al final.

Technical name: One hand one foot Can of Soup
Name: Pastisroll
description: Can of soup with only using the back hand and the front foot hooking the line.
descriptionEs: Lata de sopa con sólo usar la mano trasera y el pie delantero enganchando la línea.

description: From Double Drop Knee grab the line with both hands and roll to the front landing back in Double Drop Knee.

Name: Kamikaze
description: From Standing, grab the line with your hands, take off your front foot, and use the back foot to push yourself into the Shoulderstand.
descriptionEs: De la caída de pie a la parada de hombros.

description: Do a Panic Roll and put your back foot onto the line. When you finished the rotation put the second foot up and stand up.
descriptionEs: Rollo de pánico pero aterrizando a los pies.
tips: During the roll get your far foot on the line. At the end of the roll get your second foot up on the line.
tipsEs: Durante la tirada, pon el pie más lejano en la línea. Al final de la tirada, pon el segundo pie en la línea.

description: At the bottom of the bounce, kick your legs to the back, immediately afterwards kick them to the front again. Then do a final kick to the back while pulling the line down in front of you, and put your feet on the line.
descriptionEs: De la mosca colgante a la exposición.
tips: Get some momentum with your legs in the bottom part of the bounce. As soon as you are weightless pull the line below your feet.; This trick doesn't require as much strength as you would think! It's all about getting enough momentum with your legs.; If you can't hold the bounce in the Rocket position try again with less bounce.
tipsEs: Coge impulso con las piernas en la parte inferior del rebote. Tan pronto como te encuentres sin peso, tira de la cuerda por debajo de tus pies; Este truco no requiere tanta fuerza como crees. Se trata de conseguir suficiente impulso con las piernas.; Si no puedes mantener el rebote en la posición colgante, inténtalo de nuevo con menos rebote.

Technical name: Reverse Rocket Mount to Double Drop Knee
description: From Hanging do a Reverse Rocket Mount but land in Double Drop Knee.
descriptionEs: Desde la horca haz un Reverse Rocket Mount pero aterriza en Double Drop Knee.

Technical name: Double Drop Knee Roll to Feet
description: From Double Drop Knee do a Double Drop Knee Roll and stand up to land in Exposure.
descriptionEs: Desde la Doble Caída de Rodilla haz un giro y levántate para aterrizar en la Exposición.

description: Do a Hammock Roll and finish with a Back Roll in the same bounce.
descriptionEs: Haz un Hammock Roll y termina con un Back Roll en el mismo rebote.

Technical name: Half Back Roll to Shoulder Roll
description: Do a Half Back Roll but add a Shoulder Roll to finish the trick.
descriptionEs: Haz un Medio Rollo de Espalda pero añade un Rollo de Hombros para terminar el truco.

Name: Frontflop
description: From Standing grab the line as in a Kamikaze, but then roll over your back and land in Korean.
descriptionEs: Desde la posición de pie haz una voltereta frontal a través de la línea y aterriza en coreano.
tips: Thread your arm through the leash so it is not wrapped around your shoulder.
tipsEs: Pase su brazo por la correa para que no se enrolle alrededor de su hombro.

description: Do a Chest Roll followed by a BS 360 Chest Flatspin.
descriptionEs: Haz un Chest Roll y en el mismo rebote un 360 Chest Flatspin.

Name: Mini-Cube
description: Do a Half Nasty 180 with an additional Front Sofa Roll. The motions happen at the same time rather than one after each other.
descriptionEs: Haz un Half Nasty 180 con un Front Sofa Roll adicional. Los movimientos se realizan al mismo tiempo en lugar de uno tras otro.

Name: Rocket Rewind Roll
description: Rocket Rewind with an additional Back Sofa Roll in the end.
descriptionEs: Rocket Rewind con un rollo de sofá trasero adicional al final.

description: From Backbounce go into the Panic Roll to Feet.
descriptionEs: Desde el Backbounce, entra en el Panic Roll to Feet.

Name: Dibahia Roll (Backflop)
description: From standing you jump straight backwards and roll over your shoulder to land in Korean.
descriptionEs: Desde la posición de pie se salta hacia atrás y se rueda por encima del hombro para aterrizar en coreano.
tips: Have the leash on the same side as the shoulder you roll over; it's a bit easier if you don't jump backwards, but instead roll over your back.
tipsEs: Tenga la correa en el mismo lado que el hombro sobre el que rueda.

description: From Rocket go up to shoulder stand.
descriptionEs: Desde Hanging sube a la posición de los hombros.
tips: When dropping down to Rocket already grab with the hands as you would for the Shoulderstand then you don't have to regrab.
tipsEs: Cuando bajes a Rocket ya agarra con las manos como lo harías para el Shoulderstand entonces no tienes que volver a agarrar.

description: In Rocket do a backflip, completely letting go of the line and landing back in Rocket.
descriptionEs: En Rocket haz un backflip, soltando completamente la línea y aterrizando de nuevo en Rocket.

Name: Sarah Roll
description: Sit in Sofa and roll to the side over your neck back to Sofa.
descriptionEs: Siéntese en el Sofá y ruede hacia un lado sobre su cuello de vuelta al Sofá.
tips: There are more comfortable tricks to try.
tipsEs: Hay trucos más cómodos para probar.

description: Do a Back Chest Roll and in the end of the roll push yourself away from the line to put your front foot on.
descriptionEs: Haz un rollo de pecho hacia atrás y al final del rollo empújate de la línea para poner los pies.

Name: Nasty Korean
description: Full Flare (see breakdancing) from Korean to Korean.
descriptionEs: Es como el movimiento de breakdance que empieza en coreano y vuelve a aterrizar en coreano.

description: Hanging on the line grabbing it with both hands and having it run under your elbows and shoulders press yourself up to Exposure.
descriptionEs: Colgarse de la línea agarrándola con las dos manos y hacerla pasar por debajo de los codos y los hombros para presionarse hasta Exponerse.
tips: Watch out for your shoulders on this one!
tipsEs: ¡Cuidado con los hombros en este caso!

description: Like an Orbital but instead of throwing your leg over the line, put the line under your butt to# land in Sofa.
descriptionEs: Como un Orbital pero en vez de lanzar la pierna sobre la línea aterrizas en Sofá.

description: Like a Rocket Mount to Sofa but instead of landing in Sofa you pop both legs through your arms and then drop back to Rocket.
descriptionEs: Piensa como si quisieras hacer un montaje de Cohete a Sofá, pero en lugar de aterrizar en Sofá, pasas ambas piernas por los brazos y luego caes de nuevo a Cohete.

description: From Korean you do a 270 BS spin to the front and then go into a Front Sofa Roll to Feet.
descriptionEs: Desde el coreano haz un giro de 270 hacia atrás junto con un giro hacia atrás terminando en Exposición.

Name: Wolf Flip to Feet
description: Reverse Flowflip to Feet.
descriptionEs: Desde el coreano haz un giro de 360º hacia atrás junto con un giro hacia atrás terminando en Pies.

description: From Rocket thread your legs in between your arms and the line and let go with one hand to start the 180. Land in Belly.
descriptionEs: Desde Rocket enhebra las piernas entre los brazos y la línea y suéltalas con una mano para iniciar el 180. Aterriza en el vientre.

description: From Shoulder push yourself forward to roll over your back and land on your Feet.
descriptionEs: Desde el hombro empújate hacia adelante para caer de pie.

description: From Sofa grab the line with one hand in the direction that you're rolling towards and pull on the line to initiate a sidewards roll. Roll over your lower back until you land back in Sofa.
tips: Grabbing the line with both hands shortly before landing can help to readjust your position a bit.

description: From Rocket swing your legs up (feet first) and put one foot on the line outside of your hands. When you finish the rotation, put the second foot on and land in Exposure.
descriptionEs: Obi Wan, pero sube detrás de la línea.
tips: Bring the foot that does not go to the line straight away far over the line to get your center of gravity right over the line and then put it on the line in the end of the trick.
tipsEs: Lleva el pie que no va a la línea recta muy por encima de la línea para que tu centro de gravedad esté justo sobre la línea y luego ponlo en la línea al final del truco.

description: Do a Back Roll, then put your back foot on the line first, and press yourself up to put the second foot on.
descriptionEs: Haz un giro hacia atrás y ve directamente a los pies.

description: Grab the line with your back hand, bring it up around your body by passing it to your other hand, and finally pass your leg over the line to land in Korean.
descriptionEs: Agarra la línea con una mano, llévala alrededor de tu cuerpo pasándola a la otra mano y aterriza en coreano.

description: Grab the line with one hand behind your head and the second hand below your back, do a Hammock Roll, and go to Feet.
descriptionEs: El rollo de la hamaca va directamente a los pies.

Name: Can of Bisque
description: Do a Can of Soup followed by a BS 270 spin landing in Exposure.
descriptionEs: Haz una lata de sopa y un 270 al mismo tiempo.

Name: Exporbital
description: Orbital to Sofa but starting in Exposure.
descriptionEs: Orbital a Sofá pero comenzando en Exposición.

Name: Mini-Eisenvader
description: From Exposure you grab the line with one hand and roll forward. As soon as you are under the line you perform an Antihero landing in Sofa.
descriptionEs: Desde la Exposición agarras la línea con una mano y ruedas hacia adelante. En cuanto estés bajo la línea realizas un Antihéroe a Sofá.

description: Do a 180 spin followed by an Orbital.
descriptionEs: Haz un 180 y luego un Orbital.

description: Start as you would for the Rocket Mount, and then half way up you push with one hand and pull with the other to initiate a 180 spin, landing in Exposure.
descriptionEs: Montaje de cohetes con un 180.
tips: The movement in the end is comparable to the Sofa 360 to Feet.
tipsEs: El movimiento al final es comparable al del Sofá 360 a Pies.

description: Sick Nasty Roll with an additional Back Sofa Roll in the same bounce.
descriptionEs: Rollo asqueroso con un rollo de sofá adicional en el mismo rebote.

description: Do a Sofa Roll 360 with an additional Back Sofa Roll in the end.
descriptionEs: Realiza un Sofa Roll 360 con un Sofa Roll de espalda adicional al final.
tips: You have to be fast with the regrab.
tipsEs: Hay que ser rápido con el regrab.

Technical name: BS 180 Front Korean Roll to Feet
Name: Fire Flip
description: Do a Mini-Fireflip to Feet.
descriptionEs: Empieza como harías un Flowflip pero rodando de frente (en dirección a tu pecho) y haz un 180 en lugar de un 360.

description: Do a Back Belly Roll to Feet.
descriptionEs: Haz un Belly Roll a los pies pero rodando hacia atrás.

description: Do a Flowflip to Feet.
descriptionEs: Flowflip pero aterrizando a Pies en la Exposición.
tips: During the flip get your far foot on the line. At the end of the flip get your second foot up on the line; A lot of people do it landing in Exposure.
tipsEs: Durante el salto, pon el pie más lejano en la línea. Al final de la voltereta, pon el segundo pie en la línea.

description: From Backbounce perform a Richy Roll but land it to Feet.
descriptionEs: Desde el Backbounce realiza un Richy Roll pero aterriza directamente en los pies.

description: From Shoulderstand roll to one side and get your feet on the line. Land in Exposure.
descriptionEs: Desde la parada de hombros rueda hacia un lado y pon los pies en la línea. Aterriza en la exposición.

description: Do the Panic Roll but instead of landing in Chest you go into Shoulderstand.
descriptionEs: Haz el rollo de pánico pero en lugar de aterrizar en el pecho te pones en posición de hombros.
tips: Regrab with one hand to land comfortably in Shoulderstand.
tipsEs: Regrab con una mano para aterrizar cómodamente en Shoulderstand.

description: From Exposure grab the line with both hands and roll around the line landing back in Exposure.
descriptionEs: Desde la Exposición agarra la línea con ambas manos y rueda alrededor de la línea aterrizando de nuevo en la Exposición.
tips: Try to wait a bit after hitting the bottom of the bounce before you start with the trick. If you start too early you will kill the bounce.
tipsEs: Intenta esperar un poco después de tocar el fondo del rebote antes de empezar con el truco. Si empiezas demasiado pronto matarás el rebote.

description: From Exposure grab the line with both hands and roll around the line backwards landing back in Exposure.
descriptionEs: Desde la Exposición agarra la línea con ambas manos y rueda alrededor de la línea hacia atrás aterrizando de nuevo en la Exposición.
tips: Try to wait a bit after hitting the bottom of the bounce before you start with the trick. If you start too early you will kill the bounce.
tipsEs: Intenta esperar un poco después de tocar el fondo del rebote antes de empezar con el truco. Si empiezas demasiado pronto matarás el rebote.

description: From your normal stance grab the line with both hands and roll around the line landing back in the starting position.
descriptionEs: Desde su posición normal, agarre la línea con ambas manos y ruede alrededor de la línea aterrizando de nuevo en la posición inicial.

description: From your normal stance grab the line with both hands and roll around the line backwards landing back in the starting position.
descriptionEs: Desde tu postura normal, agarra la línea con ambas manos y rueda alrededor de la línea hacia atrás aterrizando de nuevo en la posición inicial.

description: Drop into the leash and on the way up climb the leash and finish with a Reverse Obi-Wan.
descriptionEs: Cae en una caída con correa y luego sube con los pies por detrás de la línea de manera similar a un Obi-Wan inverso.
tips: Amazing leash fall saving trick.
tipsEs: Increíble truco para salvar la caída de la correa.

description: Sick Nasty Roll but starting in Exposure.
descriptionEs: Sick Nasty Roll pero comenzando en Exposure.

Name: Flower
description: Like a normal Flow to Feet but adding a 180 at the end.
descriptionEs: Como un Flow to Feet normal pero añadiendo un 180 al final.

Name: Spaghetti Roll
description: Do a Hammock Roll from Feet and add an extra Hammock Roll at the end.
descriptionEs: Doble rodillo hasta el rebote.

Name: Tamatta Roll
description: Double Sofa Roll landing in Exposure.
descriptionEs: Aterrizaje del sofá doble en la exposición.

Name: Tre Nasty
description: Start with the motion of a Half Nasty 180 but pass your legs over the line once more and keep spinning to do a full 360 landing back in the starting position.
descriptionEs: Comienza con el movimiento de un Sick Nasty 180 pero sigue girando y haz un 360 completo aterrizando de nuevo en la posición inicial.

description: Do a Chest Roll followed by a 180 Chest Flatspin to Feet.
descriptionEs: Haz un Rollo de Pecho y en el mismo rebote un Flatspin de Pecho 180 a Pies.

description: From Exposure do a front flip off the line and catch the line to land in Rocket.
descriptionEs: Desde Exposure haz una voltereta frontal fuera de la línea y atrapa la línea para aterrizar en Rocket.

Technical name: Rocket Mount Side Roll to Sofa
description: From Rocket Mount do a Side Roll with the axis of rotation perpendicular to the line and land in Sofa.
descriptionEs: Desde el montaje del cohete haz un giro lateral con el eje de rotación perpendicular a la línea y aterriza en Sofá.
tips: Flip one of your hands to allow for a better initiation of the momentum.
tipsEs: Voltea una de tus manos para permitir una mejor iniciación del impulso.

Technical name: Korean Roll from Feet to Feet
Name: Sushi Roll
description: Do a Korean Roll but starting from Feet and landing to Feet.
descriptionEs: Haz un rollo coreano pero empezando por los pies y aterrizando en los pies.

Name: Sakalorbital
description: Grab the line with one hand, bring it around your body by passing it to your other hand above your head. Put the line back under your feet to land in Exposure.
descriptionEs: Agarra la línea con una mano, llévala alrededor de tu cuerpo pasándola a tu otra mano y luego aterriza en Exposición.

Name: Tre Nasty to Chest
description: Tre Nasty landing in Chest.
descriptionEs: Tre Nasty aterrizando en el pecho.

description: Do a Freak Nasty landing in Exposure.
descriptionEs: Haz un Half Nasty pero con un aterrizaje de 180 en Exposure.

description: Spin 540 on the line in a standing position.
descriptionEs: Gira 540 en la línea en posición de pie.

description: From Rocket swing your legs up (feet first) and put both feet on the line inside of your hands and land in Exposure.
descriptionEs: Como un Rocket Mount pero subiendo por detrás de la línea.
tips: Sam and Ian have quite different techniques for this trick. Try both and see which one suits you (or do your own variation of course).
tipsEs: Sam e Ian tienen técnicas bastante diferentes para este truco. Prueba ambos y ve cuál te conviene (o haz tu propia variación, por supuesto).

description: From Exposure do a front flip while hooking one foot under the line and putting it back on the line for the landing.
descriptionEs: Desde la Exposición haz una voltereta frontal mientras enganchas un pie bajo la línea y lo vuelves a poner en la línea para el aterrizaje.
tips: After 270 deg of rotation try to pull the line under yourself with your feet.
tipsEs: Después de 270 grados de rotación, intenta tirar de la línea debajo de ti con los pies.

description: Almighty flip but from normal stance.
descriptionEs: Voltereta todopoderosa pero desde la posición normal.

description: Like the Barrel Almighty Flip but flipping backside.
descriptionEs: Como la vuelta del barril pero volteando en la otra dirección.

description: From Exposure do a back flip while hooking one foot under the line and putting it back on the line for the landing.
descriptionEs: Desde la Exposición haz una voltereta hacia atrás mientras enganchas un pie bajo la línea y lo pones de nuevo en la línea para el aterrizaje.
tips: First lean back and then kick/hook the line.
tipsEs: Primero inclínate hacia atrás y luego patea/engancha la línea.

Name: Despedido
description: Start with a Back Korean Roll during which you are leaning forward, move your legs above the line to transition into a 360, land in Korean.
descriptionEs: Es un rollo coreano trasero y un 360 al mismo tiempo.

Name: Kung Pao
description: Do a Shrimpflip and in the same bounce another roll backwards around the line.
descriptionEs: Haz un Shrimpflip y en el mismo rebote otra vuelta alrededor de la línea.

description: A Can of Soup without hands, basically a Back Almighty starting from Soup.
descriptionEs: Una lata de sopa sin manos, básicamente un Back Almighty partiendo de Sit.
tips: Throw your hands in the air at the bottom of the bounce, it will allow you to gain more momentum to finish the rotation.
tipsEs: Lanza las manos al aire en la parte inferior del rebote, te permitirá ganar más impulso para terminar la rotación.

Name: Whatever
description: Drop into the leash and on the way up climb the leash and finish with a Rocket Mount.
descriptionEs: Déjate caer en una caída de la correa y al subir sube la correa y tira de la línea bajo tus pies.

Technical name: Sick Nasty from Feet to Feet
description: Sick Nasty from Feet to Feet.
descriptionEs: Enfermo asqueroso de pies a cabeza.

Technical name: Back Roll from Chest to Feet
Name: Frog Flip
description: From Chest you push off the line with both hands to get into a Back Roll to Feet.
descriptionEs: Desde el pecho empujas la línea con ambas manos para entrar en un backflip y luego aterrizar a Pies.

Name: Fireball
description: From Korean, do a BS 270 spin and finish with a Back Belly Roll to Feet.

Name: Tre Flip
description: Start with the motion of a Half Nasty 180 but pass your legs over the line once more and keep spinning to do a full 360 and then add a roll around the line to land back in the starting position.
descriptionEs: Comienza con el movimiento de un Half Nasty 180 pero sigue girando, haz un 360 completo y añade un giro, aterrizando de nuevo en la posición inicial.

Name: High'N'Mighty
description: Barrel Front Almighty Flip but instead of hooking the line with your foot you press the line against your leg.
descriptionEs: Barrel Front Almighty Flip pero en lugar de enganchar la línea con el pie, presionas la línea contra tu otra pierna.

Name: 180 Backflop
description: Do a 180 and then do a Backflop.
descriptionEs: Haz un 180 y luego pasa a un Rollo de Espalda desde los Pies.

Name: Panic Attack
description: You do a Panic Roll to Feet but don't use your hands to hold the line. Instead use your foot to hook the line and go to Feet.
descriptionEs: Haces un Rollo de Pánico a Pies pero no usas las manos para sujetar la línea. En lugar de ello, utiliza el pie para enganchar la línea y pasar a Pies.

Name: King Prawn
description: Do a Shrimpflip 180 but then go to Feet.
descriptionEs: Haz un Shrimpflip 180 pero luego ve a Pies.

Name: 180 Frontflop
description: From Standing you turn 180 and do a Frontflop.
descriptionEs: Desde la posición de pie se gira 180 y se hace un Frontroll desde los pies.

description: Orbital to Feet but with a 360 spin.
descriptionEs: Orbital a Pies pero con un giro de 360.

Name: Darth Vader
description: Like an Antihero but landing in Exposure.
descriptionEs: Como un Antihéroe a Sofá pero aterrizando en Exposición.

Name: Adrenaline Roll
description: Do a 90 with restepping and go into a Yoda Roll.
descriptionEs: Haz un 90 con restepping y pasa a un Yoda Roll.

description: Almighty Flip but instead of hooking the line with your foot you grab and pull on the leash.
descriptionEs: Almighty Flip, pero en lugar de enganchar la línea con el pie, agarras y tiras de la correa.

Name: Backbounce Nirvana
description: Nirvana from Backbounce.
descriptionEs: Nirvana de Backbounce.

description: Panic Roll with an additional roll landing to Feet.
descriptionEs: Rollo de pánico con un rollo de pecho adicional aterrizando a los pies.

description: From Soup do a double roll and land on your feet in normal stance.
descriptionEs: Desde la posición de sentado (con una pierna) se hacen dos rollos hacia el lado y se aterriza sobre los pies en posición normal.

Name: Nirvana
description: Do a Sofa Roll 360 and land in Exposure.
descriptionEs: Haz un Sofa Roll 360 pero ve hacia los pies y aterriza en la exposición.

description: Rocket Mount with a 360.
descriptionEs: Montaje de cohete con un 360.
tips: First spin a little bit into the opposite direction to then explode out the way you really want to spin.; Try to avoid doing a Rocket Mount 180 and then restep with your feet but go for the 360 right away.
tipsEs: Primero gira un poco en la dirección opuesta para luego explotar en la dirección que realmente quieres girar; trata de evitar hacer un Rocket Mount 180 y luego vuelve a dar un paso con los pies, pero ve a por el 360 de inmediato.

description: Like a Sofa 360 to Feet but with a late 180.
descriptionEs: Desde el Sofá se hace un Sofá 360 a Pies pero se añade un 180 al final.
tips: Try to not do the 360 and then restep to get the 540 but instead go for the 540 directly.
tipsEs: Intenta no hacer el 360 y luego el restep para conseguir el 540, sino que ve directamente a por el 540.

Name: Flowflip from Feet to Feet
description: From switch do 270 spin and go into a Yoda Roll and finish by turning to normal stance.
descriptionEs: Desde la posición de cambio, gira 180 con sólo girar los pies (sin pisar). Luego haz un Adrenaline Roll pero cuando estés aterrizando, gira los pies de nuevo para no aterrizar en Exposición sino en postura normal.
tips: Either start or land in switch.
tipsEs: O bien empieza o aterriza en el interruptor.

Name: Tesseract
description: Start by doing the Butter and roll to your back, put your feet on the line to land in Expo.
descriptionEs: Comienza haciendo el Butter y rueda hacia tu espalda para aterrizar en la Expo.

description: From Exposure do a 180 and during the spin go into the Yoda Roll.
descriptionEs: Desde la Exposición haz un 180 y durante el giro entra en el Yoda Roll.

Name: Dojo Roll
description: Turn 180 to your BS and go into a Back Yoda Roll finishing the last 90 degrees of spin.
descriptionEs: Gira 180 hacia tu BS y entra en un Back Yoda Roll terminando los últimos 90 grados de giro.

Name: Dirty Sofa
description: Start in Sofa, then bring one foot up to the line to hook it and go for an Almighty Flip.
descriptionEs: Comienza en Sofá y luego lleva un pie hasta la línea para engancharla y hacer una Voltereta Todopoderosa.

description: Double Shoulder Roll landing in Exposure.
descriptionEs: Aterrizaje con doble hombro en la exposición.

description: It's almost a Front Yoda Roll and a Back Yoda Roll in the same bounce. Start at the very bottom of the bounce with a Front Yoda Roll so the line snaps up and after around three quarters of rotation you have some resistance of the line to push off of into the Back Yoda Roll.
descriptionEs: Es casi un Yoda Roll frontal y un Yoda Roll trasero en el mismo rebote. Comienza en la parte inferior del rebote con un Yoda Roll frontal para que la línea se levante y después de tres cuartos de rotación tengas algo de resistencia de la línea para empujar hacia el Yoda Roll trasero.
tips: Start a lot earlier than you would for most tricks.
tipsEs: Empieza mucho antes de lo que lo harías para la mayoría de los trucos.

description: It's almost a Back Yoda Roll and a Front Yoda Roll in the same bounce. Start at the very bottom of the bounce with a Back Yoda Roll so the line snaps up and after around three quarters of rotation you have some resistance of the line to push off of into the Front Yoda Roll.
descriptionEs: Es casi un Back Yoda Roll y un Front Yoda Roll en el mismo rebote. Comienza en la parte inferior del rebote con un Yoda Roll trasero para que la línea se levante y después de tres cuartos de rotación tengas algo de resistencia de la línea para empujar hacia el Yoda Roll delantero.
tips: Start a lot earlier than you would for most tricks.
tipsEs: Empieza mucho antes de lo que lo harías para la mayoría de los trucos.

description: Tre Nasty landing to Feet.
descriptionEs: Tre Nasty aterrizando a Pies.

Name: Cosmonaut
description: Expoorbital to Feet with a 360 spin.
descriptionEs: Expoorbital a Pies con un giro de 360.

Technical name: Hammock Roll from Feet to Feet
Name: Lasagna Roll
description: Hammock Roll starting from Feet and going directly back to Feet.
descriptionEs: Rodar en hamaca empezando por los pies y volviendo directamente a los pies.

Technical name: Panic Roll 180 from Feet to Feet
Name: Total Nirvana
description: Basically a Sofa Roll 360 from Feet to Feet.
descriptionEs: Básicamente un Sofá Roll 360 de Pies a Pies.

Technical name: Back Roll from Feet to Feet
Name: Backflip
description: It is a Back Roll from Feet to Feet.
descriptionEs: ¡El Backflip de highline freestyle! Como su nombre indica es un Back Roll de pies a pies.

Technical name: Rocket Front Belly Roll to Feet
Name: Supersonic Mount
description: From Rocket get a lot of momentum with your feet and do one roll forward around the line and land in Exposure.
descriptionEs: Desde el Hanging coge mucho impulso con los pies y haz un roll frontal alrededor de la línea y aterriza en Exposure.

Name: Back Turtle Roll
description: Two Back Yoda Rolls in one bounce.
descriptionEs: Dos Rollos de Yoda hacia atrás en un solo rebote.

Name: Darkside Roll
description: Do a Sick Nasty Roll but instead of swinging both your legs over the line again put one foot on the line and keep the other one behind the line. Then put the second foot on and stick the trick.
descriptionEs: Comienza con un Sick Nasty Roll, pero en lugar de balancear ambas piernas sobre la línea, pon un pie en la línea y mantén el otro detrás de la línea. Luego pon el segundo pie y pega el truco.

description: Darth Vader with a 180.
descriptionEs: Darth Vader con un 180.

description: Do a 180 and then go into a Front Almighty Flip.
descriptionEs: Haz un giro de 180º y luego entra en una voltereta frontal todopoderosa.

description: Double Barrel Roll.
descriptionEs: Rodillo de doble barril.

Name: Frontflip (Chrysalis)
description: Front Roll from Feet to Feet.
descriptionEs: En un rebote haz un Frontroll partiendo de Pies y aterrizando de nuevo en Pies.
tips: Longer lines allow for more time to execute the trick.
tipsEs: Las líneas más largas permiten más tiempo para ejecutar el truco.

Name: Turtle Roll
description: Two Yoda Rolls in one bounce.
descriptionEs: Dos rollos de Yoda en un rebote.

description: Starting in switch do a 270 spin, go into a Front Almighty Flip and in the end turn 90 to look back at the same anchor as where you started.
descriptionEs: Empezando en posición de cambio, haces un giro de 270 y pasas a un Front Almighty Flip al final giras 90 para mirar de nuevo al mismo ancla donde empezaste.

Name: Overflow
description: From your regular stance do a frontside 270 and roll around the line like you would for a Flowflip. Try to land back in your normal stance and not in Exposure.
descriptionEs: Desde tu postura normal haz un 270 frontal y rueda alrededor de la línea como lo harías para un Flowflip. Intenta aterrizar de nuevo en tu postura normal y no en Exposure.

description: Start with a Barrel Roll and then add an Orbital 180 in the same bounce.
descriptionEs: Empieza con un Barrel Roll y luego añade un Orbital en el mismo rebote.
tips: You gotta be quick for this one.
tipsEs: Tienes que ser rápido para esto.

Technical name: Half Nasty 180 Front Sofa Roll to Feet
Name: Rubik's Cube
description: It's a Half Nasty 180 with a Front Sofa Roll landing in Exposure.
descriptionEs: Es un Half Nasty 180 con un aterrizaje en exposición.

description: Makako landing in Exposure.
descriptionEs: Makako aterrizando en Exposición.

description: Despedido landing in Exposure
descriptionEs: Despedido aterrizando en Exposición

description: It's a Super Sonic late 180 or Rocket Rewind to Feet.
descriptionEs: Es como un Rocket Rewind a Feet.

description: 360 Almighty Flip.
descriptionEs: El verdadero Frente 360 Todopoderoso con la postura inicial y final siendo la misma.

description: From Rocket get a lot of momentum with your feet and do one roll backwards around the line and land in Exposure.
descriptionEs: Desde la suspensión coge mucho impulso con los pies y haz un giro hacia atrás alrededor de la línea y aterriza en la exposición.

Name: Ninja Shifta
description: Shapeshifter landing to feet.
descriptionEs: Shapeshifter aterrizando a los pies.

Name: Shrimpzilla
description: Shrimpflip to Reverse Rocket Mount.
descriptionEs: Volteo de camarones a montura de cohete invertida.

Name: Megaminx
description: Start like you would for the Half-Nasty 180, but then keep spinning to do a 360 by regrabing your hands and finish Reverse Obi-Wan.
descriptionEs: Piensa en ello como un cubo de Rubik 180.

description: Start in regular position, rotate 180° backside and do a backflip starting from switch position. Roll over the same shoulder as the normal backflip.
descriptionEs: Comienza en posición normal, gira 180° hacia atrás y haz un backflip partiendo de la posición de cambio. Aterriza en el mismo hombro que la voltereta normal.
tips: Get the 180° backflop as solid as possible first!
tipsEs: Primero haz el backflop de 180º lo más sólido posible.

Name: Double Dibahia
description: Double Backroll from feet.
descriptionEs: Doble retroceso desde los pies.
tips: Protecting your arm from leashburns could be beneficial.
tipsEs: Proteger el brazo de las quemaduras por presión podría ser beneficioso.

Name: Yodermatt
description: Back Yoda Roll to Back Yoda Roll 180 in one bounce.
descriptionEs: Rollo de Yoda hacia atrás a Rollo de Yoda hacia atrás 180 en un rebote.

description: Three Back Yoda Rolls in one bounce.
descriptionEs: Tres Rollos de Yoda hacia atrás en un solo rebote.

Technical name: Barrel Almighty Flip to Barrel Roll
Name: Holy Grail
description: Start by doing a Barrel Almighty Flip and go for a second roll by grabbing the line and doing a Barrel Roll.
descriptionEs: Empieza haciendo un Barrel Almighty Flip y haz una segunda tirada agarrando la línea y haciendo un Barrel Roll.

Name: Eisenvader
description: Start in Expo and roll down until you are in Rocket. Then do a Darth Vader.
descriptionEs: Comienza en la Expo y rueda hacia abajo hasta que estés bajo la línea. Entonces haz un Darth Vader.

description: Double Back Almighty Flip.
descriptionEs: Doble Vuelta Todopoderosa
tips: Do the first one laid out and tuck for the second one to get good momentum.; Try to get the hook at your ankle. If the line is near your toes it's hard to pull it around for the second roll.
tipsEs: Haz la primera tirada y métete para la segunda para conseguir un buen impulso; Intenta que el gancho esté en tu tobillo. Si la línea está cerca de los dedos de los pies es difícil tirar de ella para la segunda tirada.

description: Double Front Almighty Flip.
descriptionEs: Doble vuelta frontal todopoderosa.
tips: Stay open for the first one and tuck for the second one to get good momentum.
tipsEs: Quédate abierto en el primero y métete en el segundo para conseguir un buen impulso.

Technical name: Front Sofa Roll Rewind to Sick Nasty Double Roll
Name: Double Boomerang
description: Start early with a Lightside Roll and use the resistance in the line to finish with a Double Sick Nasty Roll.

Name: Shrimp Cocktail
description: Start with a Shrimpflip, let go with one hand to initiate the 360 spin and land in Exposure.

Name: Downward Spiral
description: Kick your back leg to the front, initiate a 360 with your upper body, and bring your front leg around to land in Korean.

Name: Capoeira Flop
description: Do a OH Back Handspring to Korean.

Technical name: Front Sofa Roll Rewind to Sick Nasty Roll
Name: Boomerang
description: Start early with a Lightside Roll and use the resistance in the line to finish with a Sick Nasty Roll.
Start with a early Sushi and go into the Backflop at the top of the bounce.

From Rocket, stay below the line, pull just your legs up and kick in between the arms with extended legs. With the momentum from the leg kick, bring your body above the line, tuck your legs and land in Exposure.
Almighty from DDK.

Name: Bangarang
description: Boomerang to Feet.

Technical name: No Hands Back Panic Roll to Feet
Name: Back Panic Attack
description: From Sofa, bring your back leg over the line (like a heel hook), initiate a roll backwards and immediately hook with your front foot, finish the roll and put your feet back on the line to land the trick.

Technical name: Front Sofa Roll Rewind to Mini-Cube
Name: Boomerang 180
description: This trick starts with an early Front Sofa Roll for which you grab both hands on your side (the Sick Nasty way). During the Front Sofa Roll, pass your legs over the line. Then use the resistance of the line to rewind your rolling direction and finish with the second half of a Mini-Cube.
We haven't figured out yet what's going on here. Look at the video and help us by updating the description.

Name: Sushi-Flip
description: Start with an early Sushi and then do a Backflip at the top of the bounce.
Do a Backflip without grabing the line.

From Rocket, swing your legs to the side, hook the line with both feet, let go of your hands to "hang" on the line at the top of the bounce, finish the sidewards motion with your upper body and regrap with the hands. Let your feet go off the line to finish back in Rocket.
From Rocket, bite the line at the top of the bounce and let go of your hands at the same time. Regrab with your hands to finish the trick in Rocket at the bottom of the bounce.

Technical name: Antihero to Sofa Roll to Feet
Name: Double Darth Vader
description: Do an Antihero followed by a Sofa Roll to Feet in the same bounce.

Name: All-Nasty
description: Start as you would for the Darkside Roll, but instead of putting the first foot on the line, hook it like for a Back Almighty, put the second foot on the line, let go of your hands and finish as you would for a Back Almighty.
From Rocket, pull yourself up half-way, then initiate the spin and land in Sofa.
Do a FS 270 spin, followed by a Back Almighty and spin another 90 degrees to finish looking back at the anchor.
Orbital to DDK.

Name: Shrimpy Hero
description: Start with a Shrimpflip, let go with one hand to initiate the 180 and finish with an Antihero, landing in Sofa.

Name: Back Attack
description: NH Panic Roll to feet starting from Backbounce.
NH Back Can of Soup to Back Yoda Roll in one bounce.
Do a 360 and a Darth Vader at the same time.
Do a Back Almighty and a Back Yoda Roll in one bounce.

Name: Lando
description: Do an Orbital, but grabing the leash instead of the line.

Name: Resurrección
description: We haven't figured out yet what's going on here. Look at the video and help us by updating the description.

Name: Anticristo
description: We haven't figured out yet what's going on here. Look at the video and help us by updating the description.

Name: Onda
description: We haven't figured out yet what's going on here. Look at the video and help us by updating the description.

Name: FireFly
description: Start the same way as you would for the Fireflip, but go directly to Expo without doing the 180.

Name: Nasty Christo
description: We haven't figured out yet what's going on here. Look at the video and help us by updating the description.

Name: Darthkako
description: From Nevermind start with the normal Makako motion but as soon as you regrab the line with your hands, do an additional 180 before coming back to Exposure. The last part of the trick is like a Darth Vader, hence the name.
This is a 180 Barrel Roll without restepping. This means you either start or land the trick in your switch stance.
On the way up in the bounce grab the line with one hand and bring it over your head. From there grab the line with your other hand and bring it back down to put your feet on.
From Korean you grab the line with both hands behind you and then swing your far leg over the line. From there aim to land on the line with both feet to finish the trick.

Name: Yodel Roll
description: From Exposure do a 360 and grab the line. Then go into a Back Yoda Roll.
From Nevermind go up spinning frontside 360 and land back in your normal stance.

Name: Infinity
description: Start out as you would for a one bounce Yoda Roll but then keep rolling. Never stop!
tips: Tim invented this trick when going for a one bounce Double Back Yoda Roll.

description: Similar to a Double Back Yoda Roll but grabbing the leash instead of the line.

Name: Soup Backflop
description: Do a Can of Soup into a Backflop in the same bounce.
Do a Backflip but then passing Exposure you add a 180 before landing the trick.
tips: Think about landing the normal Backflip in switch so when you add the 180 you are back in your normal stance.

Name: Barrelflop
description: Do a Barrel Roll and add a late Backflop.

Name: Yodermatt
description: Double Back Yoda Roll with a 180 in the second Roll.

Name: Legolas
description: Jump into the leash doing a frontflip from Exposure then use your foot to step into the leash and then back on the line.
Three Front Yoda Rolls in one bounce.

Name: Nevermighty
description: Start like a normal Nevermind but then push into the line with the foot that is already on the line to create momentum into a back roll. Use your second foot to hook the line and finish with a Back Almighty.

Name: Vortex
description: Ter o double sholder roll na base
tips: Executar com muita força

Name: Sushi-Flip
description: Start with an early Sushi and add a Backflip to it
Like a regular Backflip but without using your hands.

Technical name: Backbounce Roll Half Spiral to Feet
Name: Chill
description: Start from backbounce and grab the line with one hand. Before the top of the bounce throw yourself to the side of the hand that grabs the line. Do a roll below the line, take with both hands and put your feet.
tips: Timing is key. When you throw yourself think of kicking up with your knees/feet to initiate the rotation.

description: Rocket Mount with a 360 spinning to your backside.

Name: Sharkbite
description: From Rocket you pull yourself up so you're able to bite the line and let go with the hands. Then grab the line again and drop back to Rocket.
tips: Watch out to not bite your lips

Name: Gorilla
description: Do a makako to feet and add an extra back yoda roll

Name: Batman
description: You drop to Rocket slightly uncentered such that you can get some momentum by swinging to one side. From there you use the momentum to swing your legs to the other side and all the way up to hook the line with both feet (the Bat-Hang position), you let go with your hands and do a 360 under the line by regrabbing the line on the other side of your feet. Unhook your feet and land back in Rocket.
It's a Darth Vader with an extra roll.

Name: Backalomo
description: Do a backbounce, when you stand up hook your foot under the line to do a back almighty.

Name: All-Nasty
description: It's a Darkside Roll but you let go with the hands while you're doing the trick and hook with one foot to finish the trick like a Back Almighty.

Name: A Chuparla
description: Bounce hard, almost at the top of the bounce throw yourself backwards and do a backflip without touching the line. Put your hands up and grab the line to end in the rocket position.

Name: Sakalhombro
description: Do a chill but instead of landing on your feet go to shoulder.
540 from Rocket to Sofa.

Name: Eclipse
description: Just like an orbital to feet but throw the line to your backside. Land on your feet.
tips: Timing is key when throwing the line.

description: Start with a frontside spin and then transition into the Back Almighty

Name: Chillin Vader
description: Go to backbounce, do a chill but instead of going directly to feet do a darth vader motion to end in expo.

Name: Never Panic
description: Go to nevermind position. When you go up the bounce cross your foot and start a panic roll. Grab the line with both hands and put your feet.

Name: 180 Backalomo
description: Do a backbounce, when you go up hook your foot on the line and start a back almighty and when you are upside down start a 180 motion, en in feet.

Name: Reverse Supermighty
description: Do a reverse súper sonic but instead of doing a back yoda roll do a back almighty
Go to rocket, kick with your feet to start a super sonic and add an extra front yoda roll.

Name: Rockako
description: Go to rocket, then kick like you would for a Makako, rotate to land on your feet. Quite similar to Shrimpzilla.

Name: King Kong
description: With a big bounce , grab the line while starting a roll backwards and from there kick like you would on a Makako. Put both feet on the line to land in expo
Do a eclipse bot don’t use your hands to move the line, let the high tension bring the line back down and go to sofa.
tips: You need the right setup, some bungees and a lot of tension on the line.

Name: Shoulder Vader
description: From Shoulder you initiate a Back Shoulder Roll but then you quickly let go with the far hand and turn more sideways. From there you finish with a Darth Vader.

Name: Impossible
description: Do a front almighty but don’t use the foot to hook, just push the line to the side,  do the front flip and almost at the end of the rotation put your feet again to land in exposure.
tips: You need the right setup. Some bungees and a lot of tension in the line.

Name: Freak Nasty Roll
description: Start with a Sick Nasty but add a 180 spin and finish with a Sick Nasty Roll
Do a eclipse but don’t touch the line with your hands, once the line goes around you land on DDK
tips: You need the right setup. Some bungees and a lot of tension.

description: Do an eclipse but don’t touch the line with your hands. Once the line goes around out your feet again. The timing of the kick is key.

Name: Nerd Flip
description: Start with a normal Boomerang but instead of finishing it with a Sick Nasty Roll you finish it with a Rubiks Cube.

Name: Kneisenvader
description: From Double Drop Knee Roll to the front until you are in the Rocket position and then use the momentum to finish with a Darth Vader

Name: Supervader
description: Supersonic to Darth Vader... Not much else to say here!
Supersonic with a 360.

Name: Sauron
description: Go to nevermind, from there start a darth kako, on mice you get the roll add another yoda roll. Land in exposure
Do a sakalorbital by kicking the line almost at the highest point of the bounce, rotate 180 let the line go around you and land again on your feet.
Just watch the video.. It's hard to describe :D

Name: Apocalypse
description: Start with a normal Eisenvader but as soon as you are in the Rocket position you turn 180 and regrab the line to finish with a Reverse Rocket Mount.
From Rocket you immediately spin 180 and regrab the line and then finish with a Reverse Supersonic.

Technical name: Front side 180 space eclipse to feet
Name: Space lord
description: Do a space eclipse, when you kick the line rotate 180 to your front side, let the line go around you and land on your feet.

Technical name: Makako to feet but at one point not touching the line
Name: Space kako
description: Go to nevermind, start a Makako but let go the line with your hands, do the rotation until your feet find the line, end in exposure.

Name: Darth Maul
description: From Expo you lean back as much as possible (as if you would do a back bridge) until you reach the line with one hand. Spin 180 and grab the line with the second hand, so that you end up in Rocket.

Name: Front Nirvana
description: From Sofa you grab the line with both hands on the side and initiate a roll to the front. You immediately go into Belly and keep rolling but then add another 180, regrab one hand and land in Expo.

Name: Beyblade
description: Drop to Rocket but with the leash wrapped around your legs. Then do a sideflip using the momentum that the wrapped leash gives you and go to feet.

Name: Space korean
description: From korean change your leg to butt and from there let the line go to do a space orbital. Use your leg to catch the line in korean.

Name: Chill Nasty Roll
description: Go to backbounce, grab the line below your back and throw your body to the same side of the grabbing hand, start a chill but instead of going to feet do a sick nasty roll.

Name: Bs space lord
description: Do a space orbital but add a back side 180 to land facing the other anchor.
180 Almighty to DDK with an extra DDK roll.

Name: Rewind turtle
description: Do a front yoda but change the direction of the spin to do a rewind and add another back yoda roll.

Name: Nirvana Attack
description: Do a nirvana but instead of using your hands put hook your foot to spin.

Name: Full Orbit
description: Start with a FS 180 then grab the line and do an Orbital but spin another 180 before landing it.
tips: Make sure to keep your body upright, otherwise you might end up just doing a Barrel Roll.

Name: No soup 180
description: Start form soup position, hook your foot to do a no soup and add a late 180.
From Yisus let one hand go and step the same foot on the line, then put the second foot and let go with the second hand to land in Expo or Normal.

Technical name: Front Sofa Roll to Front Nirvana
Name: 360 Tamatta Roll
description: Start with a Front Sofa Roll and then go into a Front Nirvana.

Name: Flower Power
description: From Korean start like you would do a flow but do 2 full spins, land on your feet.

Name: Shoulder roll almighty
description: Do a shoulder roll to feet, instead of putting the second foot on the line do a hook to end with an almighty.

Name: Sugar Cube
description: From Butt you spin backside and roll to your back, hook the line with your kneepit then put your other leg over the line so that you can step on the line with the hooking leg and finally put the second foot on the line.
Just watch the video...
Start with a BS 180 and then finish with an Orbital to Feet

Name: Han Solo Rewind
